zh.Bishops Castle, Shropshire, England, Uni: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾比曉普也斯 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Oakeley於1360年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾比曉普也斯 卡素時，他的父親Roger Oakeley30歲，母親Mrs Roger Oakeley30歲。他於1399年與Mrs William Oakeley在英國英格蘭史洛普爾比曉普也斯 卡素結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1399年在英國英格蘭享年39歲。

nameMeanings.name: Oakeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Oakley
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from any of numerous places called Oakley, Oakle, or Oakleigh, in Bedfordshire, Essex, Gloucestershire, Hampshire, Kent, Somerset, Suffolk, or Wiltshire. The placenames derive from Old English āc ‘oak’ + lēah ‘open woodland’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Oakeley was born in 1360, in Bishop's Castle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Oakeley, was 30 and his mother, Mrs Roger Oakeley, was 30. He married Mrs William Oakeley in 1399, in Bishop's Castle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1399, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39.

Il a épousé Mrs William Oakeley en 1399, à Bishop's Castle, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1399, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: William Oakeley(이)가 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 비숍'스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Oakeley(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Roger Oakeley(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 비숍'스 카스틀에서 Mrs William Oakeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1399년 영국 잉글랜드에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Oakeley родился в 1360 г. в местности бишоп'с кастл, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Oakeley было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Roger Oakeley, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs William Oakeley в 1399 г. в местности бишоп'с кастл, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1399 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет.
